subject: siamese readiness update for Christchurch | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-7245
body: Following yesterday's call, the siamese effort in Christchurch needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Ada Lovelace seems to disagree with Nikola Tesla on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-7245. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: urban-watch, quality.
